# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on pull requests and includes the PR title and description in build notifications. Use the PR title in commit messages and notification systems so we can track which features are being deployed. This helps with our release notes automation.
# Category: cicd_security

name: PR Build and Notify

on:
  pull_request:
    types: [opened, synchronize, reopened]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v3
        
      - name: Set PR info as environment variables
        run: |
          echo "PR_TITLE=${{ github.event.pull_request.title }}" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          echo "PR_NUMBER=${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          echo "PR_AUTHOR=${{ github.event.pull_request.user.login }}" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          echo "PR_URL=${{ github.event.pull_request.html_url }}" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          
      - name: Extract PR description
        id: pr_description
        run: |
          PR_BODY=$(cat <<'EOF'
          ${{ github.event.pull_request.body }}
          EOF
          )
          echo "pr_body<<EOF" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "$PR_BODY" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "EOF" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          
      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v3
        with:
          node-version: '18'
          
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci
        
      - name: Run tests
        run: npm test
        
      - name: Build application
        run: npm run build
        
      - name: Create build artifact with PR metadata
        run: |
          mkdir -p build-metadata
          cat > build-metadata/pr-info.json << EOF
          {
            "pr_number": ${{ github.event.pull_request.number }},
            "pr_title": "${{ env.PR_TITLE }}",
            "pr_author": "${{ env.PR_AUTHOR }}",
            "pr_url": "${{ env.PR_URL }}",
            "commit_sha": "${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}",
            "base_branch": "${{ github.event.pull_request.base.ref }}",
            "head_branch": "${{ github.event.pull_request.head.ref }}"
          }
          EOF
          
      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v3
        with:
          name: build-artifacts-pr-${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
          path: |
            dist/
            build-metadata/
            
  notify-slack:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    if: always()
    
    steps:
      - name: Prepare notification message
        id: message
        run: |
          if [ "${{ needs.build.result }}" == "success" ]; then
            STATUS_EMOJI=":white_check_mark:"
            STATUS_COLOR="good"
            STATUS_TEXT="Success"
          else
            STATUS_EMOJI=":x:"
            STATUS_COLOR="danger"
            STATUS_TEXT="Failed"
          fi
          
          echo "status_emoji=$STATUS_EMOJI" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "status_color=$STATUS_COLOR" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "status_text=$STATUS_TEXT" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          
      - name: Send Slack notification
        uses: slackapi/slack-github-action@v1.24.0
        with:
          payload: |
            {
              "text": "${{ steps.message.outputs.status_emoji }} PR Build ${{ steps.message.outputs.status_text }}",
              "attachments": [
                {
                  "color": "${{ steps.message.outputs.status_color }}",
                  "fields": [
                    {
                      "title": "PR Title",
                      "value": "${{ github.event.pull_request.title }}",
                      "short": false
                    },
                    {
                      "title": "PR Number",
                      "value": "#${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}",
                      "short": true
                    },
                    {
                      "title": "Author",
                      "value": "${{ github.event.pull_request.user.login }}",
                      "short": true
                    },
                    {
                      "title": "Status",
                      "value": "${{ steps.message.outputs.status_text }}",
                      "short": true
                    },
                    {
                      "title": "Repository",
                      "value": "${{ github.repository }}",
                      "short": true
                    },
                    {
                      "title": "PR Link",
                      "value": "<${{ github.event.pull_request.html_url }}|View PR>",
                      "short": false
                    },
                    {
                      "title": "Description",
                      "value": "${{ github.event.pull_request.body }}",
                      "short": false
                    }
                  ],
                  "footer": "GitHub Actions",
                  "footer_icon": "https://github.githubassets.com/favicon.ico",
                  "ts": ${{ github.event.pull_request.updated_at }}
                }
              ]
            }
        env:
          SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL: ${{ secrets.SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL }}
          SLACK_WEBHOOK_TYPE: INCOMING_WEBHOOK
          
  notify-teams:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    if: always()
    
    steps:
      - name: Prepare Teams notification
        id: teams_message
        run: |
          if [ "${{ needs.build.result }}" == "success" ]; then
            THEME_COLOR="00FF00"
            STATUS="Success"
          else
            THEME_COLOR="FF0000"
            STATUS="Failed"
          fi
          
          echo "theme_color=$THEME_COLOR" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "status=$STATUS" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          
      - name: Send Teams notification
        run: |
          PR_BODY_ESCAPED=$(echo '${{ github.event.pull_request.body }}' | jq -Rs .)
          
          curl -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{
            "@type": "MessageCard",
            "@context": "https://schema.org/extensions",
            "summary": "PR Build Notification",
            "themeColor": "${{ steps.teams_message.outputs.theme_color }}",
            "title": "PR #${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}: ${{ github.event.pull_request.title }}",
            "sections": [
              {
                "activityTitle": "Build ${{ steps.teams_message.outputs.status }}",
                "activitySubtitle": "Author: ${{ github.event.pull_request.user.login }}",
                "facts": [
                  {
                    "name": "Repository",
                    "value": "${{ github.repository }}"
                  },
                  {
                    "name": "Branch",
                    "value": "${{ github.event.pull_request.head.ref }}"
                  },
                  {
                    "name": "Status",
                    "value": "${{ steps.teams_message.outputs.status }}"
                  },
                  {
                    "name": "Description",
                    "value": '"$PR_BODY_ESCAPED"'
                  }
                ]
              }
            ],
            "potentialAction": [
              {
                "@type": "OpenUri",
                "name": "View Pull Request",
                "targets": [
                  {
                    "os": "default",
                    "uri": "${{ github.event.pull_request.html_url }}"
                  }
                ]
              },
              {
                "@type": "OpenUri",
                "name": "View Workflow Run",
                "targets": [
                  {
                    "os": "default",
                    "uri": "${{ github.server_url }}/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }}"
                  }
                ]
              }
            ]
          }' ${{ secrets.TEAMS_WEBHOOK_URL }}
        if: env.TEAMS_WEBHOOK_URL != ''
        env:
          TEAMS_WEBHOOK_URL: ${{ secrets.TEAMS_WEBHOOK_URL }}
          
  create-release-note:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    if: success()
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v3
        
      - name: Generate release note entry
        run: |
          mkdir -p .release-notes
          
          cat > .release-notes/pr-${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}.md << 'EOF'
          ## PR #${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}: ${{ github.event.pull_request.title }}
          
          **Author:** @${{ github.event.pull_request.user.login }}
          **Branch:** `${{ github.event.pull_request.head.ref }}` → `${{ github.event.pull_request.base.ref }}`
          **Date:** ${{ github.event.pull_request.created_at }}
          
          ### Description
          ${{ github.event.pull_request.body }}
          
          ### Changes
          - Commit SHA: `${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}`
          - [View PR](${{ github.event.pull_request.html_url }})
          
          ---
          EOF
          
      - name: Upload release note
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v3
        with:
          name: release-note-pr-${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
          path: .release-notes/
          
  notify-email:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    if: always()
    
    steps:
      - name: Send email notification
        uses: dawidd6/action-send-mail@v3
        with:
          server_address: smtp.gmail.com
          server_port: 465
          username: ${{ secrets.EMAIL_USERNAME }}
          password: ${{ secrets.EMAIL_PASSWORD }}
          subject: "[${{ needs.build.result }}] PR #${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}: ${{ github.event.pull_request.title }}"
          to: ${{ secrets.NOTIFICATION_EMAIL }}
          from: GitHub Actions
          body: |
            Pull Request Build Notification
            
            Status: ${{ needs.build.result }}
            PR Number: #${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
            Title: ${{ github.event.pull_request.title }}
            Author: ${{ github.event.pull_request.user.login }}
            Repository: ${{ github.repository }}
            
            Description:
            ${{ github.event.pull_request.body }}
            
            View PR: ${{ github.event.pull_request.html_url }}
            View Workflow: ${{ github.server_url }}/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }}
            
            Base Branch: ${{ github.event.pull_request.base.ref }}
            Head Branch: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.ref }}
            Commit SHA: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}
        continue-on-error: true
